untranslatable_reason: The signal requires explicit detection of: (1) an upward trend line (not available—would need line_slope or trend detection), (2) a secondary peak/bump formation (requires pattern recognition beyond point indicators), and (3) confirmation of a break below the initial trend line. These are structural pattern elements that cannot be expressed as simple indicator comparisons. The volume conditions are translatable but the core BARR pattern geometry is not.
translation_notes: Approximated entry as price crossing below SMA_20 (proxy for trend line break) with high volume confirmation. True BARR pattern detection requires trend line drawing and peak/trough identification logic not available in the allowed indicator set. Exit condition reversed to close above SMA_20 (reversal of entry signal). Failure rate of 5% noted but not encoded as it applies to pattern frequency, not individual trade rules.
